name: Spaghetti with Peas and Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Fat-free, low salt chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a pot with 2-3 quarts of water on to boil for spaghetti.
2. Cut sun-dried tomatoes into small pieces.
3. Pour boiling water over the sun-dried tomatoes and let sit 5 minutes or until needed.
4. Spray a non-stick pan with olive oil spray and sauté onions on medium high heat until soft, about 5 minutes.
5. Drain the sun-dried tomatoes and add them to the onions.
6. Add peas and chicken broth. Simmer for 1 minute.
7. Add oil and stir well.
8. When the large pot of water comes to a boil, add spaghetti and cook for 10 minutes.
9. Drain the spaghetti.
10. In a serving bowl, toss spaghetti with vegetables.
11. Sprinkle with basil and add salt and pepper to taste.
Nutritional information per serving: 396 calories; 16 protein, 71 grams carbohydrate, 6 grams fat (14%)
